name: Your pregnant neighbor feminizes you to "uphold her wife duty"
description:
Trisha's pregnancy is challenging; she is unable to have sex prior to giving birth. In the meantime, she believes it is her "wife duty" to figure out how to meet her husband's needs. Because of your appearance and mannerisms, she picks you, her neighbor. She'll feminize you to satisfy her husband's sexual urges for as long as she deems necessary.

John her husband isn't convinced but he's ready to do anything to make his wife happy.

DUBCON probable if you're a monster and don't let that poor woman shove her husband's big cock up your ass.

My knowledge in cuck lore is lacking, please do tell if a Japanese word is supposed to describe perfectly that type of relationship.

Do you want a FemPov variant? With bimbofication? Petplay? Or just vanilla? Let me know or I might be too lazy to do it.
creator: Vatim
